title: When setting a date in "remind me" emails are not being sent on set date
excerpt:
I have linked my gmail into my Monday account and when I set a reminder date to email me I will receive nothing in my inbox. 
Any ideas of how to fix this automation?

posts.author: Liamground (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have linked my gmail into my Monday account and when I set a reminder date to email me I will receive nothing in my inbox.

Any ideas of how to fix this automation?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Liam! Charlotte here from the monday team!

Would you be able to attach a screenshot of the integration recipe you’re using to achieve this? Perhaps something is off in the setup that it is not being properly triggered.
